baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Turn a vague GitHub bug report with comments into a builder-ready completion contract.
evals.expected_output: Reads issue and repo context, classifies readiness, asks for missing decisions when needed, and writes acceptance criteria, non-goals, risks, and required evidence.
assertions: Does not mark the issue ready without checkable acceptance criteria.
Separates outcome, non-goals, touched areas, and validation requirements.
Identifies blockers, dependencies, and migration/security risks.
Hands off to builder/checker/reviewer without implementing code.
